series_metadata.series_description: File contain any information relating to National Deposit Insurance Corporation.

retention_rules.disposition: Microform: Retain master microfilm in off-site storage for 25 years, then destroy. Retain diazo copy of the master in the operating area for 25 years, then destroy ; Paper: Retain in office area for 2 years, then microfilm. After microfilm has been checked for accuracy and completeness, destroy hard copy, Microform: Shred ; Paper: Shred
